Container.Name: OnStar2MQTT
Container.Overview: OnStar to MQTT bridge. Publishes vehicle data and enables remote commands via MQTT/Home Assistant. Deploy once per vehicle, changing the container name each time.
Container.Description: OnStar to MQTT bridge. Publishes vehicle data and enables remote commands via MQTT/Home Assistant.

Config.Name: ONSTAR_DEVICEID
Config.Description: A generated v4 UUID uniquely identifying this vehicle connection. Generate one at uuidgenerator.net. Must be unique per vehicle.

Config.Name: ONSTAR_PIN
Config.Description: 4-digit OnStar PIN used for remote commands.

Config.Name: ONSTAR_TOTP
Config.Description: TOTP seed key from OnStar two-factor authentication setup. Found when enrolling an authenticator app in your OnStar account security settings.

Config.Name: MQTT_HOST
Config.Description: Hostname or IP of the MQTT broker.

Config.Name: ONSTAR_REFRESH
Config.Description: How often to poll OnStar for data, in milliseconds. Default is 30 minutes (1800000). Do not set below 1800000 or you will be rate limited.

Config.Name: ONSTAR_STATE_CACHE
Config.Description: Merge partial API responses with cached data to prevent Home Assistant template warnings.
